content:
I need to multiply 194 × a70 in base 11.

First, let me convert each base-11 number to base-10:

194₁₁ = 1×11² + 9×11¹ + 4×11⁰ = 121 + 99 + 4 = 224₁₀

a70₁₁ = 10×11² + 7×11¹ + 0×11⁰ = 1210 + 77 + 0 = 1287₁₀

Now multiply in base-10:
224 × 1287 = 288,288₁₀

Now convert 288,288₁₀ back to base-11:
288288 ÷ 11 = 26208 remainder 0
26208 ÷ 11 = 2382 remainder 6
2382 ÷ 11 = 216 remainder 6
216 ÷ 11 = 19 remainder 7
19 ÷ 11 = 1 remainder 8
1 ÷ 11 = 0 remainder 1

Reading the remainders in reverse: 187660

187660
